__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus data source containing Sortie metrics

description: Operational overview for Sortie — the spec-first AI agent orchestrator. Covers sessions, tokens, agent runtime, dispatches, workers, retries, reconciliation, polling, tracker API, tracker comments, handoffs, dispatch transitions, CI feedback, tool calls, and SSH host utilization.

panels.title: Build Info
panels.description: Sortie version and Go runtime version from sortie_build_info.

panels.title: Active Sessions Elapsed
panels.description: Sum of wall-clock elapsed seconds across all running sessions.

panels.title: Token Consumption
panels.description: Tokens per minute by type (input, output, cache_read).

panels.title: Dispatch Outcomes
panels.description: Dispatch attempts per second by outcome (success vs error).

panels.title: Agent Runtime
panels.description: Rate of cumulative agent runtime accumulation (seconds/second). Represents effective agent concurrency.

panels.title: Worker Exits
panels.description: Worker session completions per second by exit_type (normal, error, cancelled).

panels.title: Worker Duration
panels.description: Distribution of worker session durations. Buckets from 10s to ~5.7h.

panels.title: Worker Duration Percentiles
panels.description: p50, p95, p99 worker session duration over 30 minutes.

panels.title: Retry Activity
panels.description: Retry rate by trigger (error, continuation, timer, stall).

panels.title: Poll Cycle Health
panels.description: Poll cycle outcomes (success, error, skipped) with average duration overlay.

panels.title: Reconciliation Actions
panels.description: Reconciliation outcomes per second by action (stop, cleanup, keep).

panels.title: Tracker API
panels.description: Tracker adapter API calls per second by operation and result.

panels.title: Handoff Transitions
panels.description: Handoff state transition outcomes (success, error, skipped) over the last hour.

panels.title: Dispatch Transitions
panels.description: Dispatch-time in-progress transition outcomes (success, error, skipped) over the last hour.

panels.title: Tracker Comments
panels.description: Tracker comment attempts per second by lifecycle point (dispatch, completion, failure) and result.

panels.title: CI Status Checks
panels.description: CI status check outcomes per second by result (passing, pending, failing, error).

panels.title: CI Escalations
panels.description: CI escalation actions per second by type (label, comment, error).

panels.title: Self-Review Iterations
panels.description: Self-review iterations per second by verdict (pass, iterate, none).

panels.title: Self-Review Sessions
panels.description: Self-review sessions per second by final verdict.

panels.title: Self-Review Verification Duration
panels.description: P95 verification command duration by command.

panels.title: Self-Review Cap Reached
panels.description: Rate of self-review sessions that hit the iteration cap.

panels.title: Tool Calls
panels.description: Agent tool call rate by tool name.

panels.title: SSH Host Utilization
panels.description: Active workers per SSH host. Hidden when no SSH hosts are configured.

title: Sortie Overview
